  • Method Details

    • add

      public final JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate add(String step)
      Appends the specified step at the end of step container.

    • remove

      public final JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate remove()
      Removes the build step currently at cursor position.

    • addCopy

      public final JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate addCopy(Path fileOrDirToCopy, String containerPath, boolean chownNonroot, boolean optional)
      A convenient method to add a COPY step for a file or directory located outside the Docker build context.

      The specified file or directory will be copied into the Docker build context, and a corresponding COPY step will be added to the Dockerfile.

      Parameters:
      chownNonroot - if true, includes the '--chown=nonroot:nonrootg' option in the COPY statement.
      optional - if false, an error is thrown if the specified file or directory does not exist.

    • addCopy

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate addCopy(Path fileOrDirToCopy, String containerPath, boolean chownNonroot)
      See Also:
      • addCopy(Path, String, boolean, boolean)

    • addCopy

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate addCopy(Path fileOrDirToCopy, String containerPath)
      See Also:
      • addCopy(Path, String, boolean, boolean)

    • addNonRootMkDirs

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate addNonRootMkDirs(String dirPath, String... extraDirs)
      Adds a Dockerfile step that creates a directory, belonging to the 'nonroot' user if such a user exists.

    • addEntrypoint

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate addEntrypoint(String... args)
      Adds an entrypoint build step

    • moveCursorBefore

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate moveCursorBefore(String prefix)
      Positions the cursor just before the first build step that begins with the specified prefix.

      Any subsequent build steps added will be appended starting from this position.

      Parameters:
      prefix - the prefix of the build step to locate
      Returns:
      the updated builder or context for chaining

    • moveCursorNext

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate moveCursorNext()

    • moveCursorBeforeUserNonRoot

      public JkDockerBuild.DockerfileTemplate moveCursorBeforeUserNonRoot()
      Moves the cursor just before ${switchNonRootUser} token.
      See Also:
      • moveCursorBefore(String)

    • render

      public String render(JkDockerBuild jkDockerBuild)
      Renders the Dockerfile template, with tokens still present.
      Parameters:
      jkDockerBuild -
